behavior_detail: WordPress path traversal and webshell access scan — 63 GET requests in 13-second burst probing wp-includes subdirectories for planted PHP files including /wp-includes/images/wp-login.php and /wp-includes/js/dist/script-modules/block-library/search/about.php. notes: AbuseIPDB 289 reports from 146 sources first reported March 8 2026 most recent 10 minutes ago — highly active. VT 4/94 malicious web attacks and xmlrpc exploitation. Azure Japan GCP instance used for automated scanning. Path injection into wp-includes confirms webshell hunting behavior. Report to Azure abuse@microsoft.com. Category 21.

behavior_detail: WordPress author enumeration — systematic GET requests for /?author=1 through /?author=20 in a 6-second burst using Apache-HttpClient/4.5.2 Java/1.8.0_151 automated tool. Enumerating author IDs to harvest real WordPress usernames for use in subsequent credential attacks. Jetpack rate-limited all 20 requests.
notes: AbuseIPDB 1143 reports from 153 sources first reported February 2024 most recent 18 hours ago — persistent long-running threat actor. Carry-over from prior incident. Tencent Cloud China. Java HTTP client confirms automated tooling. User enumeration harvesting precedes credential attack campaigns. Block in MalCare to prevent future enumeration attempts. Category 21.
